svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(102, 102, 102), rgb(149, 149, 149));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 144px; height: 1px; padding-top: 14px; margin-left: 6px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
